findings: README.md documents using claude-haiku-4.5 in examples, while AGENTS.md says worker/merger use the Copilot CLI session default; this can confuse what default model actually runs.
Docs describe metaswarm using premium child-model overrides, but do not clearly define the premium pool/banned list in README.md or AGENTS.md.
Rotation via --models is mentioned in AGENTS.md but is not clearly explained in README.md, leading to ambiguity for multi-model/premium rotation usage.
